hypothesis: For REINVENT pre-trained on ChEMBL35 and fine-tuned on the 103 CTFs, augmenting the RL reward with a diversity-promoting penalty proportional to the inverse average pairwise Tanimoto similarity will enable the model to simultaneously reach internal diversity ≥80% and percentage of molecules passing expert filters ≥80%, whereas the same configuration without the diversity term cannot achieve both metrics concurrently.
